message:
Update plugin configuration to v1.0.10

- Update .claude-plugin/plugin.json version to 1.0.10
- Update .claude-plugin/marketplace.json version to 1.0.10
- Sync plugin manifest with package.json version

This completes the plugin release process for v1.0.10.
